name: Countryhumans party
description:
Hi everyone, I'm here to wish you all a happy new year and a (belated) Christmas. I hope next year brings lots of luck and happiness to us all :3

Bot updated!! Okay, I confess that this bot was made very lazily. I fixed many things in its personality. Maybe I'll make another bot.

(English is not my native language, so please excuse any mistakes.)
